description: This AWS control checks whether Amazon GuardDuty is enabled in your AWS account and region.

execution_guidance.blast_radius_summary: Affects account-wide security posture for account 696505809372.
execution_guidance.expected_outcome: Direct fix applies the change in AWS immediately: Amazon GuardDuty will be enabled in this region. Security Hub should reflect the remediated state within ~1 hour.
execution_guidance.label: Enable GuardDuty (direct fix)

post_checks.message: Confirm the remediation run completed successfully and capture the run logs or audit artifacts for change evidence.
Verify the completed change only affected the intended account scope for AWS::::Account:696505809372.
Within ~1 hour, confirm the finding or action moves to PASSED/resolved in Security Hub and the action queue.

pre_checks.message: Confirm this change is intended for AWS::::Account:696505809372 in account 696505809372 (us-east-1).
Direct fix mutates AWS state immediately after approval. Confirm change window and rollback owner before execution.
WriteRole is required for direct-fix execution.
No specialized dependency checks are available for this strategy yet.

notes: Capture the current state before approval when your operating policy requires a backout snapshot.
rollback.summary: Use this rollback command to revert the live AWS change if verification fails or the blast radius is broader than expected.

execution_guidance.blast_radius_summary: Affects account-wide security posture for account 696505809372.
execution_guidance.expected_outcome: PR mode produces a reviewable infrastructure change: Amazon GuardDuty will be enabled in this region. After merge and apply through your IaC path, Security Hub should reflect the remediated state within ~1 hour.
execution_guidance.label: Enable GuardDuty (PR bundle)

post_checks.message: Review the generated bundle or diff, then capture plan and apply evidence after the change is merged through the normal infrastructure workflow.
Verify the completed change only affected the intended account scope for AWS::::Account:696505809372.
Within ~1 hour, confirm the finding or action moves to PASSED/resolved in Security Hub and the action queue.

pre_checks.message: Confirm this change is intended for AWS::::Account:696505809372 in account 696505809372 (us-east-1).
Confirm the repository, deployment path, and approver that own this infrastructure change before generating the PR bundle.
No specialized dependency checks are available for this strategy yet.

notes: Prefer reverting through version control and your normal deployment pipeline so rollback stays auditable.
rollback.summary: Use this rollback path to revert the infrastructure change through the same reviewed delivery workflow.

toxic_combinations.explanation: Related context is incomplete for toxic-combination evaluation (Public exposure plus privilege weakness plus sensitive data); no boost was applied.

title: GuardDuty should be enabled
what_is_wrong: This AWS control checks whether Amazon GuardDuty is enabled in your AWS account and region.
what_the_fix_does: Enables GuardDuty detector coverage in the target region.
